## Secrets

The commander was once a deserter from a rival faction. If this surfaces, the garrison mutinies.

## Hooks

- A courier arrives with a letter identifying the commander's past. They want the PCs to suppress it.
- The commander offers the party a contract that requires crossing into hostile territory.

## True Account

The missing fingers are from a curse, not battle.
